name: Buttermilk Bread
recipeInstructions:
For Welbilt/DAK and Zojirushi machines, add 2 tablespoons more buttermilk.
For the Welbilt machine, add 1 tablespoon more buttermilk.
Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature. If necessary, microwave the liquid ingredients to reach a comfortable consistency.
Place all ingredients in the bread machine according to the manufacturer's instructions.
Select the light setting.
